seo.title: 3 Week Yoga Retreat Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Learn proper form and basic fundamentals of yoga with 3 Week Yoga Retreat. See what the program includes, any equipment needed and meet your trainers here.

trainers.bioBodi: Originally a mathematician, Vytas has been a pioneer in the modern yoga movement for more than 15 years, bringing precision and expert instruction to everything he does. Today, he’s one of the most sought-after instructors in the world—but you can experience his transformative classes live on BODi from the comfort of home.

Barre Blend™ creator Elise Joan is a former professional dancer and has created programming in all genres of fitness—from barre and yoga to cycling and strength. She is also the creator of Pre-/Postnatal Barre Blend and the “I Am” meditation series on Beachbody On Demand®. Deepen your mind/body connection and build a lean, shredded dancer’s physique with her barre, strength, yoga, and other live classes on BODi™.

A lifelong athlete, Ted approaches yoga with total commitment and focus. He believes in the power of meditation and restorative yoga, which strengthens muscles, builds stamina and prevents injuries. His versatility and knowledge allow him to teach a wide range of students and a variety of styles.

Faith uses yoga’s tools of breathing, movement and flexibility in fresh ways. She blends classic yogic principles, meditation and real-world experience into a free-spirited teaching style. Always eager to learn and share, Faith is an inspiring and generous teacher to yoga students of all levels.

data.descriptionShort: Want to learn Yoga? Master the fundamentals of yoga at home in just 21 days.
data.descriptionLong: Created with beginners in mind, 3 Week Yoga Retreat will teach you simple, pure yoga for life-changing results. You'll build the skills you need to take any yoga class after these three weeks.​

modules.equipment: Yoga Mat, Yoga Blocks*, Yoga Strap*, Towel*, Pillow*, Yoga Blanket*

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: BODi’s nutrition programs have helped millions of people get control over food. Ultimate Portion Fix®, created by Autumn Calabrese, takes the guesswork out of eating the right portions while enjoying your favorite foods. With 2B Mindset®, created by Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, you can overcome emotional and mindless eating while enjoying satisfying meals––no measuring or counting required! For sustainable weight loss, choose the program that best fits your lifestyle and goals.

trainers.bio:
"Super Trainer Elise Joan is the creator of the fitness programs BODi LAVA, Barre Blend, Pre & Post Natal Barre Blend, and co-creator of 3 Week Yoga Retreat and FIRE AND FLOW. She’s a former professional dancer and has created programming in all genres of fitness—from barre and yoga to cycling and strength. In addition to being certified in the Science of Well-Being through Yale University, Elise prioritizes mental health and internal wellness, along with the physical results she’s known for.
"

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZDb4y3.descriptionLong: Elise helps you build on what you learned in Week 1 by progressing poses you already know, introducing new ones, and combining them all with breathing, starting in this core-focused class.

trainers.bio:
"Super Trainer Elise Joan is the creator of the fitness programs BODi LAVA, Barre Blend, Pre & Post Natal Barre Blend, and co-creator of 3 Week Yoga Retreat and FIRE AND FLOW. She’s a former professional dancer and has created programming in all genres of fitness—from barre and yoga to cycling and strength. In addition to being certified in the Science of Well-Being through Yale University, Elise prioritizes mental health and internal wellness, along with the physical results she’s known for.
"

trainers.bio: A lifelong athlete, Ted approaches yoga with total commitment and focus. His versatility and knowledge allow him to teach a wide range of students and a variety of styles.
